actionGoals: ask for the withheld truth without shattering fragile trust
test whether care can survive direct naming
interrupt the family script that keeps grief orderly
drama.actionObstacles: every answer threatens to reopen grief in front of the wrong audience

actionResults.final: the attempt succeeds emotionally, but at the price of a fractured arrangement
actionResults.default: the attempt shifts leverage without resolving the central tension

drama.conflictStakeLines: identity, dignity, family trust, and public consequence

conflictEscalations.setup: private grief and public reputation pull the same event toward incompatible meanings
conflictEscalations.revelation: speaking the truth now threatens both dignity and belonging
conflictEscalations.default: every attempt to act reveals a larger cost

eventTriggers.final: a withheld confession surfaces in the wrong room at the wrong time
eventTriggers.default: a small gesture exposes what routine tried to keep contained

eventImpacts.final: the emotional reading of the family shifts permanently
eventImpacts.default: the local balance tilts without resolving the larger pressure

eventFollowThroughs.final: no one can return to the version of the story that existed before
eventFollowThroughs.default: the consequences ripple into the next interaction without announcement
